author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #759 (same defect: AcpServer.session_map unbounded + shared messages Vec). Verified at HEAD 80439851: src/acp.rs:128 still holds 'session_map: HashMap<String, String>' and src/acp.rs:130 holds a single shared 'messages: Vec<Value>' cleared on each session/new. Both tickets describe the identical bug with the identical mandated refactor (AcpSessionState struct keyed by ACP id + LRU eviction). Closing the higher-numbered duplicate; tracking under #759.
